analysis: The opening night on 14 July was rough — just under six hours — but you bounced back hard with a 9h 22m night that included over two hours of REM, and then held a pretty solid middle stretch sitting mostly in the 7-to-8 hour range. The real texture here is your deep sleep, which peaked beautifully at 53 minutes on the 17th and then quietly slid back down to the high 20s by the end of the week, which is worth keeping an eye on. The last two nights are showing some restlessness too — 49 and then 82 minutes awake is your body telling you something's a little unsettled, even if the total hours look okay on paper. Your stack is clearly doing something good in the middle of this stretch, so the question is just what shifted toward the end — stress, timing, or maybe the routine quietly slipping.
